Now, how does this relate to other Eastern philosophical concepts? Well, Buddhism comes to mind. Buddhism emphasizes impermanence (anicca), suffering (dukkha), and non-self (anatta). Also, Zen Buddhism might be connected, as it often emphasizes simplicity and the present moment. Maybe wabi-sabi is a part of Zen aesthetics?
